title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas led with 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their standing in the ACC Tournament and their chances for the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats NC State, with Malik Thomas scoring 16 points and Thijs De Ridder adding 15.
charlotte_impact: This win contributes to Virginia's overall season record and their performance in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State Wolfpack to play No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides context and odds for the NC State vs. Virginia ACC Tournament game.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Federal Funding for Law Enforcement
summary: Charlotte City Council requests $10M+ in federal funding for police equipment upgrades.
charlotte_impact: Increased funding could improve law enforcement capabilities and public safety in Charlotte.

title: Juvenile Arrested in Monroe Bedroom Break-in
summary: Monroe Police arrest a juvenile suspect in connection with a home break-in and assault.

title: Monroe Native Honored as NASA Hidden Figure
summary: Dr. Christine Darden, from Monroe, NC, recognized for her contributions to NASA during Women's History Month.
charlotte_impact: Dr. Darden's story inspires future generations of women in STEM fields.

title: Salisbury Building Transformed into Senior Housing
summary: Historic Salisbury building converted into affordable senior housing community.

title: Perfect Weather Forecasted for Spring
summary: Weather forecast predicts a steady increase in temperatures, feeling like April, May, and June throughout the weekend.

title: Former USPS Employee Sentenced in Mail Theft, Fraud
summary: Andre Whitehurst sentenced to 15 months for mail theft and bank fraud scheme involving $364,000 in losses.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of mail theft and fraud, impacting financial security.

title: Catawba County Considers School District Merger
summary: Catawba County considers merging local schools into one school district, named Catawba Valley School District.
charlotte_impact: A school district merger could impact resource allocation and educational quality.

title: Shooting Near Charlotte Walmart Injures One
summary: One person injured in a shooting outside the Walmart on North Tryon Street in Charlotte's University City.

title: Authorities Seek to Identify Skeletal Remains in Lancaster County
summary: Lancaster authorities release a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in 2024.
